violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Dirty cloth found on the counter near ice machine. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Seals on the refrigerated prep table used on cook line and the chest freezer are broken and do not seal. Seals should be properly maintained so equipment works efficiently.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Dirty knife found on top of the refrigerated prep table near 2 door Coke cooler. Food contact surfaces should be cleaned after each use.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system, including filters, was found dirty. Hood ventilation system should be cleaned more frequently and maintained clean.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine chlorine sanitizing solution was found at 0ppm during inspection. Chlorine solution used for sanitizing food contact surfaces should be at least 100ppm.

Prep/vegetable sink. — --Prep sink was not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line. Drain from the prep sink goes to the floor just over the drain. Prep sinks should have an air gap between the sink drain and the floor drain.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor throughout the kitchen was found dirty, especially under equipment. Flooring should be thoroughly cleaned and maintained clean. Ceiling tiles and light fixtures throughout the kitchen were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Multiple food items found in the refrigerated prep table, 2 door Coke cooler, and below counter refrigerator above 41F. All items above 41F should be discarded.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Cold-holding unit on cooking line does not work. Foods that must be cold held were not at a temp of 41F or below.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --The walk-in cooler does not have food items properly stored. Raw meats are being stored over foods that require a lower cooking temp. and ready to eat foods.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Cutting boards are old, damaged, and in need of replacement. Mildew underneath.--Damaged insulation on the lift door of chest freezer. This is damaged to the point of needing to be replaced. Exterior of fryers in need of cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Prep area in need of cleaning. Many food items have residue built up.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine tested at 0ppm of chlorine during the time of the inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Ceiling and walls have very visible damage and are in need of repairs. Cracked tile in prep area. Utility room walls have intense damage and in need of repairs.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided, maintained (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)

Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)

Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
